revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{used in system}} Outputs each of the parameters separated by commas and, between the second last and last, the word " and " (this can be changed with the '''and=''' parameter). Any number of parameters may be specified.
It is intended for use by other templates to output a suitably formatted list when the number of parameters varies. Named parameters, except for those specified below, are discarded.
White space in parameters is discarded. To include white space, use a [[:en:Character entity reference|Character entity reference]] or [[:en:Numeric character reference|Numeric character reference]].
== Usage == <kbd><nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''first''|''second''|''third''| ... }}</kbd>
The named parameters are:
:<kbd>'''after'''</kbd>: The text to follow the final item. This might be a semicolon, for example. The default is to have no following text. This is not used if the list is empty (has no items). :<kbd>'''and'''</kbd>: The text to use where by default " and " is written. This may be overridden if there is a preference for a comma before the "and", or where it makes sense to write it in a language other than English, for example. :<kbd>'''comma'''</kbd>: The text to use between items except the last and one-before-last. If not specified, the default is ", ".
:Any of the named parameters can be set empty; this differs from them not being present (i.e. use the default).
== Examples == More examples are given in the [[{{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|test cases]].
{| class="wikitable" ! Input !! Output |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} |}
== See also == * {{tl|Separated entries}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Enum%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Enum%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{used in system}} Outputs each of the parameters separated by commas and, between the second last and last, the word " and " (this can be changed with the '''and=''' parameter). Any number of parameters may be specified.
It is intended for use by other templates to output a suitably formatted list when the number of parameters varies. Named parameters, except for those specified below, are discarded.
White space in parameters is discarded. To include white space, use a [[:en:Character entity reference|Character entity reference]] or [[:en:Numeric character reference|Numeric character reference]].
== Usage == <kbd><nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''first''|''second''|''third''| ... }}</kbd>
The named parameters are:
:<kbd>'''after'''</kbd>: The text to follow the final item. This might be a semicolon, for example. The default is to have no following text. This is not used if the list is empty (has no items). :<kbd>'''and'''</kbd>: The text to use where by default " and " is written. This may be overridden if there is a preference for a comma before the "and", or where it makes sense to write it in a language other than English, for example. :<kbd>'''comma'''</kbd>: The text to use between items except the last and one-before-last. If not specified, the default is ", ".
:Any of the named parameters can be set empty; this differs from them not being present (i.e. use the default).
== Examples == More examples are given in the [[{{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|test cases]].
{| class="wikitable" ! Input !! Output |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} |}
== See also == * {{tl|Separated entries}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Enum%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{used in system}} Outputs each of the parameters separated by commas and, between the second last and last, the word " and " (this can be changed with the '''and=''' parameter). Any number of parameters may be specified.
It is intended for use by other templates to output a suitably formatted list when the number of parameters varies. Named parameters, except for those specified below, are discarded.
White space in parameters is discarded. To include white space, use a [[:en:Character entity reference|Character entity reference]] or [[:en:Numeric character reference|Numeric character reference]].
== Usage == <kbd><nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''first''|''second''|''third''| ... }}</kbd>
The named parameters are:
:<kbd>'''after'''</kbd>: The text to follow the final item. This might be a semicolon, for example. The default is to have no following text. This is not used if the list is empty (has no items). :<kbd>'''and'''</kbd>: The text to use where by default " and " is written. This may be overridden if there is a preference for a comma before the "and", or where it makes sense to write it in a language other than English, for example. :<kbd>'''comma'''</kbd>: The text to use between items except the last and one-before-last. If not specified, the default is ", ".
:Any of the named parameters can be set empty; this differs from them not being present (i.e. use the default).
== Examples == More examples are given in the [[{{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|test cases]].
{| class="wikitable" ! Input !! Output |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C}} |- | {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} || {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|A|B|C|D}} |}
== See also == * {{tl|Separated entries}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
